biological_replicate: we describe the CSPs found in three mammalian cell lines
technical_replicate: we performed APEX2- and SiA-based labeling in triplicate
experimental_design: compare CSPs in adherent versus three-dimensional pancreatic adenocarcinoma cells
factor_value: HPAF-II cells and three mammalian cell lines
number_of_fractions: we performed all subsequent APEX2 experiments with reduced biotin-phenol (2 mins) and increased H2O2 incubation periods (2 mins)
